## Scope

This repository is primarily a public product hub for XplorOne.

Pull requests are currently limited to documentation fixes, typo fixes, broken-link fixes, screenshot or metadata updates, and other public-facing repository maintenance unless explicitly discussed first.

## Checklist

- [ ] I did not include private financial data, API keys, local tokens, license codes, or unredacted logs.
- [ ] I did not add source code or reusable product internals without prior agreement.
- [ ] I checked links or file references that changed.
- [ ] I described the user-facing impact of this change.
